featured.headline: PLUGIN
featured.title: Make Mermaid diagrams actually interactive.
featured.subtitle: VitePress Mermaid Renderer adds zoom, pan, fullscreen, export, and theme-aware rendering to Mermaid blocks in your docs.

featured.headline: DESKTOP APP
featured.title: HTML widgets for your Windows desktop.
featured.subtitle: HTWind turns web widgets and PowerShell helpers into a configurable desktop workspace with live preview and tray integration.

featured.headline: SELF-HOSTED
featured.title: Own your booking flow end to end.
featured.subtitle: Booking Calendar is a self-hosted PWA for appointments, notifications, shareable links, and conflict-safe scheduling.

featured.headline: STATIC SITE
featured.title: Publish your GitHub stars as an atlas.
featured.subtitle: My Stars Atlas turns starred repositories into a searchable static catalog with categories, filters, and progressive loading.

apps.name: VitePress Mermaid Renderer
apps.subtitle: Interactive Mermaid diagrams for VitePress docs.
apps.description: A VitePress plugin that turns Mermaid code blocks into interactive diagrams with export and theme support.
apps.longDescription: Transform static Mermaid diagrams into interactive visualizations inside VitePress. The plugin adds zooming, panning, fullscreen mode, code copy, theme-aware rendering, and export options for documentation sites that need more than a static SVG.
apps.requirements: A VitePress project with Mermaid diagrams
features: Zoom, pan, and reset controls for complex Mermaid diagrams
Fullscreen mode for distraction-free diagram review
Theme-aware rendering that follows light and dark mode
Export diagrams as SVG, PNG, or JPG

apps.name: HTWind
apps.subtitle: HTML widgets and PowerShell tools for the Windows desktop.
apps.description: A desktop widget manager that brings HTML widgets, automation, and live editing to Windows.
apps.longDescription: HTWind is a customizable Windows widget manager built around HTML-based widgets. It supports desktop widgets, PowerShell execution, live preview editing, tray workflows, visibility rules, and persistent widget state so desktop tooling stays practical instead of decorative.
features: HTML desktop widgets with lock and unlock interaction modes
Built-in PowerShell execution for quick system actions
Live widget editor with hot reload preview
Tray integration and smart fullscreen visibility suppression

apps.name: Booking Calendar
apps.subtitle: Self-hosted appointment scheduling with PWA support.
apps.description: A single-admin booking platform with shareable links, notifications, and self-hosted data ownership.
apps.longDescription: Booking Calendar is a self-hosted PWA for managing appointments without handing scheduling data to a third party. It includes admin scheduling controls, public booking pages, cancellation flows, notifications, webhooks, and SQLite-backed persistence aimed at practical small-scale booking workflows.
features: Admin dashboard for slots, appointments, and booking links
Conflict-safe booking flow with overlap prevention
Email, web push, and webhook notification support
Installable PWA backed by self-hosted SQLite storage

apps.name: GPVBlazor
apps.subtitle: Explore GitHub profiles, repos, gists, and star history.
apps.description: A Blazor-based GitHub profile explorer with analytics, charts, and repository insights.
apps.longDescription: GPVBlazor is a responsive GitHub profile viewer built with Blazor Server. It combines user search, repository browsing, gist viewing, README previews, star history charts, and profile statistics into a single interface for exploring open-source activity in more depth than the default GitHub profile pages.
features: Search GitHub users with profile, repo, and gist exploration
Interactive star history and profile statistics visualizations
README preview and repository filtering in one interface
Authentication options to extend GitHub API rate limits

apps.name: product-planning-copilot
apps.subtitle: Documentation-first planning system teams can fork and adapt.
apps.description: A reusable repository template for PRDs, roadmaps, architecture notes, and planning quality gates.
apps.longDescription: product-planning-copilot is a forkable planning workspace for teams that want a consistent documentation-first process. It ships with project folder templates, requirement IDs, task and risk tracking conventions, reusable Copilot assets, and validation hooks that help planning artifacts stay structured as a project grows.
apps.requirements: GitHub repository access and Node.js for validation tooling
features: Project templates for briefs, PRDs, roadmaps, and architecture notes
Traceable requirement, task, and risk identifiers
Reusable Copilot instructions, prompts, and skill assets
Deterministic validation hook for planning quality gates

apps.name: linkedin-hide-viewed-jobs
apps.subtitle: Hide or highlight viewed LinkedIn job posts.
apps.description: A privacy-first userscript that hides or marks viewed jobs across LinkedIn Jobs pages.
apps.longDescription: linkedin-hide-viewed-jobs is a userscript for LinkedIn Jobs focused on stability, multilingual detection, and safer scrolling. It can hide or highlight viewed listings, remembers preferences, supports LinkedIn SPA navigation, and includes guard logic to reduce the chance of rate-limit or bot-detection issues while browsing.
apps.requirements: Tampermonkey or Violentmonkey in a supported browser
features: Hide mode and highlight mode for viewed job posts
Scroll guard to reduce aggressive LinkedIn scrolling behavior
Draggable badge with live viewed and hidden counters
Multilingual viewed and applied detection across LinkedIn routes

apps.name: Mermaid Viewer
apps.subtitle: Live Mermaid editor with instant preview and sharing.
apps.description: A modern Mermaid web app for editing, previewing, and sharing diagrams in real time.
apps.longDescription: Mermaid Viewer is a full web application for creating and sharing Mermaid diagrams with a polished editing workflow. It combines a Next.js frontend and NestJS backend so users can edit diagrams live, preview changes instantly, and share results through a purpose-built diagram interface rather than a raw code editor alone.
features: Real-time Mermaid editing with live preview
Shareable diagram workflow backed by a dedicated API
Monorepo setup with Next.js frontend and NestJS backend
Designed for fast iteration on documentation and diagramming

apps.name: Reddit RSS API
apps.subtitle: Structured Reddit RSS feeds as filterable JSON.
apps.description: A Deno service that converts subreddit RSS feeds into JSON with filters, sorting, and random selection.
apps.longDescription: Reddit RSS API is a lightweight Deno-powered HTTP service that turns subreddit RSS feeds into structured JSON responses. It supports merging multiple subreddits, filtering media posts, sorting or shuffling results, limiting output size, and rewriting Reddit links for legacy old.reddit.com views.
features: Merge feeds from multiple subreddits into one response
Filter media posts or fetch a random post on demand
Sort chronologically or shuffle results with mixed mode
Serve CORS-friendly JSON from a zero-dependency Deno runtime

apps.name: Env Protector
apps.subtitle: Keep .env secrets hidden before they reach the editor.
apps.description: A VS Code extension that intercepts environment files and lets you view or manage them safely.
apps.longDescription: Env Protector is a VS Code extension built around a security-first workflow for `.env` files. Instead of masking secrets after a file opens, it intercepts access before rendering, offers a masked view, and lets you add, edit, or remove variables without exposing raw values during screen sharing or recordings.
features: Intercept .env file opening before secrets render on screen
Masked virtual view for reviewing keys without exposing values
Add, edit, and remove variables without opening the raw file
Workspace-level hiding of sensitive env files in the explorer

apps.name: My Stars Atlas
apps.subtitle: Turn GitHub stars into a searchable public catalog.
apps.description: A static site generator that publishes a curated atlas of starred GitHub repositories with filters and progressive loading.
apps.longDescription: My Stars Atlas turns a GitHub account's starred repositories into a browsable static catalog. It fetches star data, applies deterministic category rules, exports chunked JSON datasets, rebuilds the site shell, and ships a GitHub Pages-friendly frontend with search, filters, sorting, and progressive loading so the full dataset stays usable without a server.
features: Fetch GitHub stars and publish them as a static searchable catalog
Deterministic rule-based categorization with configurable overrides
Chunked JSON output for progressive loading on GitHub Pages
Frontend filters for category, language, license, recency, and popularity

apps.name: GitHub Spam Account Blocker
apps.subtitle: Review and block suspicious GitHub accounts with an explainable workflow.
apps.description: A browser-only React app and reusable GitHub Action for detecting suspicious follower and following accounts before blocking them.
apps.longDescription: GitHub Spam Account Blocker helps you moderate your GitHub social graph without relying on blind automation. It analyzes followers and following accounts, explains why profiles look suspicious, lets you review detections in a queue-based UI, and also ships a reusable GitHub Action for scheduled dry runs or optional blocking workflows.
apps.requirements: Modern browser and a GitHub Personal Access Token
features: Analyze followers and following accounts with sensitivity profiles
Review suspicious profiles with explainable detection reasons before blocking
Block and unblock accounts through a controlled queue with progress logs
Reuse the bundled GitHub Action for scheduled dry runs or optional blocking
